requirements.text: Anchor fragments on .md references (file.md#section) pass through to the target URL and scroll to the correct heading
The documents view uses path-style routing (/prj/:code/documents/:path) and reads the file path from useParams
Must not alter ticket reference link behavior
Must not alter external link behavior
Must work for relative paths, bare filenames, and sibling ticket references
Frontend must not perform security checks or file existence validation — that is the backend's responsibility
A .md reference containing a ticket key pattern (e.g. MDT-151.md, MDT-150-smartlink-doc-urls.md, MDT-151) navigates to that ticket's view.

A bare .md filename (e.g. architecture.md) inside a ticket view navigates to the current ticket's subdocument. A relative .md path with .. (e.g. ../../README.md) navigates to the documents view with the resolved file path.
Existing link classification and rendering must remain unchanged

scenarios.title: A .md reference outside the ticket folder routes to the documents view
scenarios.given: a ticket MDT-150 with subdoc docs/CRs/MDT-150/bdd.md containing a reference to ../../core-layout.md
scenarios.when: the user views the rendered bdd.md and clicks the ../../core-layout.md link
scenarios.then: the browser navigates to /prj/MDT/documents/docs/core-layout.md and the documents view displays that file

scenarios.title: A .md reference to another ticket main doc routes to that ticket view
scenarios.given: a ticket MDT-150 with subdoc docs/CRs/MDT-150/bdd.md containing a reference to ../MDT-151.md
scenarios.when: the user views the rendered bdd.md and clicks the ../MDT-151.md link
scenarios.then: the ticket viewer navigates to /prj/MDT/ticket/MDT-151 and displays that ticket

scenarios.title: The documents view uses path-style routing with useParams
scenarios.then: the documents view reads the path from useParams and displays docs/core-layout.md

scenarios.title: A bare .md filename in a ticket view resolves to the current ticket's subdoc
scenarios.given: a ticket MDT-150 with subdoc bdd.md containing a reference to architecture.md
scenarios.when: the user views the rendered bdd.md and clicks the architecture.md link
scenarios.then: the ticket viewer navigates to /prj/MDT/ticket/MDT-150/architecture.md and displays that subdoc

scenarios.title: A ticket-key-prefixed .md filename routes to that ticket (not double-wrapped)
scenarios.then: the result contains a single clean ticket link [MDT-150-smartlink-doc-urls.md](/prj/MDT/ticket/MDT-150), not a double-wrapped corruption

scenarios.title: Anchor fragments on .md references scroll to the correct heading
scenarios.then: the target view navigates to the subdoc URL with #overview and the browser scrolls to the heading with id overview

obligations.title: Documents view migrates to path-style route /prj/:code/documents/* with useParams()
Ticket and external link rendering must remain unchanged
obligations.sourceRef: Architecture: ticket and external links untouchable

obligations.title: SmartLink must not perform security checks or file existence validation
markdownPreprocessor ticket link and document link behavior unchanged (only exclusion guard added). linkProcessor remains entirely unchanged.
SmartLink resolves bare .md filenames as current ticket subdocs and relative .. paths as documents view, using ticket key from current route (useParams). Ticket-key pattern refs route to that ticket.
Anchor fragments on .md refs pass through resolution unchanged to the final URL

Preprocessor resolves bare/relative .md refs to absolute URLs using sourcePath. Bare filenames become ticket subdoc URLs. Ticket-key patterns become ticket URLs. Relative .. paths become documents URLs.
obligations.sourceRef: Architecture: preprocessor resolves all link types

obligations.title: TicketViewer threads sourcePath (subdocument.filePath or ticketsPath/ticketKey.md) through MarkdownContent to useMarkdownProcessor to preprocessMarkdown

artifacts.sourceRef: Architecture: wraps .md refs as links, no routing logic, unchanged
Architecture: unchanged, SmartLink handles .md resolution directly
Architecture: sole routing authority for .md refs, path resolution + boundary checks
Architecture: migrates to useParams for path-style document routes

testPlans.title: linkNormalization path resolution (BR-1, BR-2, BR-3, C3, C4)

tasks.title: Preprocessor: resolve bare/relative .md refs to absolute URLs using sourcePath
Plumb sourcePath from TicketViewer through MarkdownContent to preprocessor
Constraint regression: verify all constraint tests GREEN
